svg.style: font-family:Lato, 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif;font-feature-settings:"liga", "kern", "calt", "lnum";text-rendering:geometricPrecision;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;font-size:18px;background-color:#fff

a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Confirmed COVID-19 cases, deaths, hospital admissions, and patients in
ICU per million people, Jan 9, 2020 to Feb 8, 2026
Limited testing and challenges in the attribution of cause of death means the cases and deaths counts may not be accurate.
Data source: World Health Organization (2026); Population based on various sources (2024); Official data collated by Our World in Data
